nasb.text: Next the standard of the camp of the sons of Ephraim, according to their armies, was set out, with Elishama the son of Ammihud over its army,

esv.text: And the standard of the camp of the people of Ephraim set out by their companies, and over their company was Elishama the son of Ammihud.

cnv.text: 以法蓮營的旗號，按著他們的隊伍起行；統領隊伍的，是亞米忽的兒子以利沙瑪。

ccb.text: 随后出发的是以法莲旗下的营队，率领以法莲支派的是亚米忽的儿子以利沙玛，
